executionPlan: Independent read-only verification: ran scripts/company-map status portfolio; ran git status/diff on the target; opened and cross-checked package.json, tsconfig.json, next.config.mjs, app/api/realtime-session/route.ts, app/layout.tsx, components/avatar/useRealtimeChat.ts, components/site/Projects.tsx, lib/utils.ts against every cited file:line in project-profile.md/modules.md; diffed actual directory listings (app/, components/, lib/, data/) against modules.md's 7 module sections; grepped .company/memory/ for absolute paths, .env content, and secret-like patterns.
summary: All 5 stage acceptance criteria pass with first-hand evidence: index is fresh at the exact target commit, spot-checked facts match source exactly (including precise file:line citations), module coverage matches the real directory tree with no invented modules, the OPENAI_API_KEY boundary is recorded correctly with zero secret leakage, and no tracked product file was modified by this task.

testsRun.result: Every spot-checked fact/citation matched source exactly

testsRun.result: No absolute paths, no secret values, no .env content. One sk- grep hit was a false positive (substring of 'TASK-001')

criteria.criterion: The company-map index is fresh at the current target commit.
A representative sample of recorded profile and module facts is independently confirmed against target source.
criteria.evidence: 8 files spot-checked (exceeds 2-file minimum); every cited file:line matched the recorded fact exactly

criteria.criterion: modules.md covers every real module and each status label matches evidence; no invented facts.
criteria.evidence: Directory listing matches modules.md's 7 sections one-to-one; all 'verified' with file:line evidence; no fabricated module

criteria.criterion: realtime-session/OPENAI_API_KEY boundary recorded correctly; no secret/.env/credential/absolute path in memory.
criteria.evidence: route.ts server-only read + ephemeral-only response confirmed by source; grep found zero absolute paths, zero secret values; only env var NAME appears

criteria.criterion: No product code or tracked product file modified by this work item.
criteria.evidence: git diff --stat shows only pre-existing README.md banner; .company/ is untracked task output; AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md pre-existing untracked, untouched

lessonsProposed: For onboarding-only tasks, precise file:line citations in memory facts are a strong, cheap independent-verification signal; QA reopened the exact cited lines to confirm.
